card_text:
Requires a justicar or Inner Circle member.
Choose a ready Camarilla vampire. Successful referendum means you search your library for an equipment card and put this card and the equipment on the chosen vampire (ignore requirements; shuffle afterward); pay half the cost rounded down of the equipment. The attached vampire can enter combat with a vampire as a +1 stealth Ⓓ action. The attached vampire cannot commit diablerie. A vampire can have only one Alastor.

rulings.text: If the weapon retrieved costs blood, that cost is paid by the vampire chosen by the terms. [LSJ 20040518]
Finding equipment is optional. When no equipment is found, alastor is still attached. [LSJ 20050331-2]
Cards requiring a discipline come in play at the inferior version. [RBK equip] [RBK recruit-ally] [RBK employ-retainer]
rulings.group: Put card in play ignoring requirements

rulings.text: Requirements do not apply. If the cost is X (e.g. {Reanimated Corpse}), X is zero. If the effect puts/moves a minion into the ready region, that minion can act this turn. [LSJ 20100204] [LSJ 20040518-2] [LSJ 20100302-1]
rulings.group: Put card in play ignoring requirements

card_text:
Requires a prince or justicar.
Choose a ready vampire. Successful referendum means this card is put on the chosen vampire. If the attached vampire's blood is reduced to 0 in combat, the attached vampire is burned and the Methuselah controlling the opposing minion gains pool equal to the attached vampire's capacity.

rulings.text: Burns the target vampire when the target is reduced to zero blood in combat, regardless of the source of the loss. [RTR 19980623]
Will not burn a vampire for entering a combat with zero blood: there must be an actual blood loss. [RTR 19980623]
Diablerie does not trigger Anathema. [LSJ 20021122-2] [ANK 20211112]
Does not trigger if the vampire is burned by aggravated damage during damage resolution. [LSJ 20021120]
Damage done by combat effects after combat ends do not trigger Anathema. [LSJ 19980225]
Multiple Anathemas don't multiply the pool gain. Once one Anathema resolves it burns the vampire and the others are burned before they get to resolve. [LSJ 20021117]
It is controlled by the controller of the minion it's on - it is not removed when another Methuselah is ousted. [PIB 20121028]

card_text:
Requires a prince or justicar.
Choose a Camarilla vampire. Successful referendum means this card is put on the chosen vampire. The attached vampire can enter combat with a vampire as a +1 stealth Ⓓ action. Vampires attempting to block the attached vampire burn 1 blood. Blood hunts cannot be called on the attached vampire. Camarilla vampires can call a referendum to burn this card as a +1 stealth political action.

rulings.text: Each copy of this card provides its own action: if the vampire manage to unlock during the minion phase, he can perform the action more than once (once per copy). [RTR 20030519]
Burn blood effects are cumulative. [LSJ 19980225]
A vampire with no blood can still block, they burn what they can. [LSJ 19970707]
The two actions provided are not cross-restrictive. Each can be performed once during the same turn by the same minion. [LSJ 20100909]

The action provided by this card is considered to be an action requiring the listed clan/sect/capacity/title (e.g. the action provided by {Open War} is considered an action that requires an Anarch, the action provided by {The Gate of Acheron} is considered an action that requires Hecata). [LSJ 20080604]

card_text: Choose a ready younger vampire. Successful referendum means the chosen vampire is moved to the uncontrolled region (breaking any temporary control effects); any cards and counters on the chosen vampire stay with them but are out of play as long as the chosen vampire remains uncontrolled.
_set: DS:U2, FN:PS, CE:PTo/PV, KMW:PAn2, LoB:PG, SP:PoS2, 25th:2, NB2:PBH1, 30th:2, SV5:PPower2

Sabbat V5.precon: Path of Power and the Inner Voice

rulings.text: Is not directed (eg. {Secure Haven} offers no protection). [ANK 20221019-3]

A banished vampire can be re-influenced normally. Cards on the banished vampire that change their capacity do not apply while uncontrolled, but additional blood for increased capacity does not drain off when they get controlled as these effects resume. [PIB 20140122] [TOM 19951209]

A banished vampire will remember all effects applied to them if they are influenced back. This includes gained or lost titles and continuous effects (eg. {The Rack}). [LSJ 20010809-3] [LSJ 20010809-2] [TOM 19960210] [RTR 20000501]
The vampire and all cards on them come back unlocked. This is not unlocking (ie. for {Anima Gathering}, {Vampiric Disease}) [LSJ 20060213] [LSJ 20060908]

The vampire is placed in their last permanent controller's uncontrolled region: it might not be the card owner. It is removed from the game when the controller is ousted. [ANK 20200408-2] [RTR 20000501]
Cannot be played if there is no legal target. [ANK 20191228]

card_text:

rulings.text: The decision to skip the turn is made before the unlock phase. If the turn is not skipped, other unlock effects (eg. using a {Vessel}) can be ordered by the acting Methuselah before paying for the First Tradition. [ANK 20210110]

Successful referendum means each vampire burns 1 blood for each point allocated. In this referendum, non-priscus titles are worth 1 less vote each, priscus title is worth 1 less ballot, and burning the Edge is worth 1 additional vote.

name: Rabble Razing

card_text: Successful referendum means this card is put in play. While your prey controls a vampire in torpor, vampires you control get +1 bleed. Vampires can call a referendum to burn this card as a +1 stealth political action. A Methuselah can have only one Raising the Portcullis.
name: Raising the Portcullis

card_text: Successful referendum means this card is put in play and each Ravnos can choose to become Camarilla. As any Ravnos enters play, they can choose to become Camarilla.
flavor_text:
Sometimes at that moment a wave of light breaks into our darkness, and it is as though a voice were saying: "You are accepted."
Paul Johannes Tillich, "The Shaking of the Foundations"
name: Ravnos Acceptance

card_text:
Requires an Independent or Anarch vampire with capacity 5 or more.
Allocate 6 points among two or more other Methuselahs. Successful referendum means each Methuselah burns 1 pool for each point allocated.

rulings.text: Cannot allocate 6 points to a single Methuselah, nor any point to yourself. Cannot be played if there is only one opponent left. [LSJ 20000622] [LSJ 20100129]

If multiple ousts happen, players whose prey gets ousted get a victory point, even if they are being ousted themselves. Only the surviving ones get 6 pool from the oust of their prey (not of their grand-prey). [LSJ 20000309]
Can allocate more points than a Methuselah has pool. [LSJ 20020819]

name: Reckless Agitation

card_text: Choose a Methuselah. Successful referendum means the chosen Methuselah gets the Edge.
name: Regaining the Upper Hand

card_text:
Requires a titled vampire.
Choose one or more Methuselahs. Successful referendum means each chosen Methuselah chooses up to three library cards in their ash heap and shuffles them into their library. Remove this card from the game, even if the action or the referendum fails or is canceled.
name: Reinforcements

fr.name: Rênes du pouvoir
fr.card_text:
Pas plus d'un seul exemplaire ne peut être joué ou appelé par partie.
Si le référendum passe, chaque Mathusalem peut choisir un vampire disponible sous son contrôle. Chaque Mathusalem gagne 6 points de réserve, puis brûle autant de points de réserve que la capacité du vampire choisi par son prédateur.

es.name: Riendas del poder
es.card_text:
Sólo se puede jugar o proponer un ejemplar de esta carta por partida.
Si el referéndum prospera, cada Matusalén puede elegir a un vampiro preparado que controle. Cada Matusalén gana 6 de reserva sanguínea, y luego quema tanta reserva sanguínea como capacidad tenga el vampiro elegido por su depredador.

card_text:
Only one Reins of Power can be played or called in a game.
Successful referendum means each Methuselah can choose a ready vampire they control. Each Methuselah gains 6 pool, then burns pool equal to the capacity of their predator's chosen vampire.

rulings.text: Applies a pool gain then a pool loss. {Poison Pill} ignores the gain and only takes the loss into account, a Methuselah cannot withdraw even if the total was positive. [ANK 20180813]

If multiple ousts happen, players whose prey gets ousted get a victory point, even if they are being ousted themselves. Only the surviving ones get 6 pool from the oust of their prey (not of their grand-prey). [LSJ 20000309]
Burning the card for a vote is not considered playing it. [ANK 20210309-2]

name: Reins of Power

card_text: Successful referendum means direction of play is reversed. Prey is still to the left, however.
flavor_text:
O Fortune, you are like the moon: ever waxing and waning.
Carl Orff, "Carmina Burana"
name: Reversal of Fortunes

card_text: Successful referendum means this card is put in play and each Assamite can choose to become Camarilla. As any Assamite enters play, they can choose to become Camarilla.
name: Revocation of Tyre

card_text:
Requires a baron.
Choose X ready unlocked Anarchs you control and allocate 2X points among one or more Methuselahs, locations, and equipment. Successful referendum means each chosen Anarch is locked, each Methuselah burns 1 pool for each point allocated, and each location or equipment allocated a point is burned.

rulings.text: Unlocked Anarchs are chosen when choosing terms. They still count if they get locked during the vote. [LSJ 20081203]
Counts as requiring an Anarch (for eg. {Powerbase: Los Angeles}). [LSJ 20080603] [LSJ 20050128]
Can allocate more points than a Methuselah has pool. [LSJ 20020819]

name: Revolutionary Council

card_text: Choose one or more Methuselahs. If this referendum is successful, put this card into play. Each chosen Methuselah receives two master phase actions during his or her master phase (instead of one). Any vampire can call a referendum to burn this card as a +1 stealth political action.
name: Rumors of Gehenna

card_text:
Requires a ready archbishop, cardinal or regent.
Choose a Sabbat vampire who is not an Inquisitor. If this referendum is successful, put this card on the chosen vampire. This vampire is an Inquisitor and gets +1 bleed. He or she may look at the top card of any Methuselah's crypt as a Ⓓ action; if it is a vampire with Blood Sorcery [tha], burn that card. Any Sabbat vampire may call a referendum to burn this card as a +1 stealth political action.

rulings.text: The two actions provided are not cross-restrictive. Each can be performed once during the same turn by the same minion. [LSJ 20100909]

The action provided by this card is considered to be an action requiring the listed clan/sect/capacity/title (e.g. the action provided by {Open War} is considered an action that requires an Anarch, the action provided by {The Gate of Acheron} is considered an action that requires Hecata). [LSJ 20080604]
rulings.group: Action requirements from a card in play

name: Sabbat Inquisitor

card_text:
Requires a ready Sabbat vampire.
Choose a ready Sabbat vampire. Successful referendum means that for the remainder of the game, any vampire attempting to block the chosen vampire burns 1 blood.

rulings.text: Burn blood effects are cumulative. [LSJ 19980225]
A vampire with no blood can still block, he burns what he can. [LSJ 19970707]
The same vampire can be chosen multiple times if multiple copies are played. [LSJ 19970707]

name: Sabbat Priest

card_text:
Requires a prince or justicar.
Choose one or more Methuselahs. Successful referendum means each chosen Methuselah gets a threat counter. Each Methuselah burns 1 pool for each threat counter he or she has during his or her unlock phase. A Methuselah may never have more than two threat counters, and he or she may burn the Edge to burn all the threat counters he or she has.

rulings.text: You can gain pool from the Edge before burning it to remove the threat counters, and loose no pool to the threat counters. [TOM 19951214-1]

name: Sabbat Threat

card_text:
Requires a Sabbat vampire with capacity above 7.
Choose a vampire with a capacity below 7 who belongs to the same clan as the acting vampire. Successful referendum means the chosen vampire is burned.

rulings.text: Does not require a specific clan: vampires that can play cards as if they were of a required clan (eg. {Mata Hari}) cannot use their ability to match a target's clan. [LSJ 20100526]

name: Sacrifice

card_text:
Requires a titled vampire.
Choose a vampire of the same sect. If this referendum is successful, put this card on the chosen vampire and unlock this acting vampire. The vampire with this card may enter combat with a vampire with capacity 4 or less or with an ally as a +1 stealth Ⓓ action.
name: Scourge

card_text: Choose a Methuselah. Successful referendum means each Methuselah burns 1 pool and the chosen Methuselah burns an additional pool.
flavor_text:
The Masquerade is unraveling as the mysticism of the mortals increases.
V.T., Vampire: The Masquerade
name: Screw the Masquerade!

card_text:
Requires a Black Hand vampire.
Choose a non-Seraph Black Hand vampire with a capacity above 5. If this referendum is successful, put this card on the chosen vampire. That Black Hand vampire gains 2 blood and is a Seraph. Non-Sabbat vampires cannot cast votes or ballots in this referendum.
name: Seraph

card_text: If this referendum is successful, put this card in play and lock all vampires with a capacity less than 4. Vampires with a capacity less than 4 do not unlock as normal during the unlock phase. Burn this card during your next master phase.

rulings.text: The "does not unlock as normal" effect is redundant with being infernal. If the minion is infernal, his controller can still pay a pool to unlock him. [LSJ 20050114]

name: Snipe Hunt

card_text:
Requires a baron.
Choose a ready Anarch vampire. If this referendum is successful, put this card on the chosen anarch. During your unlock phase, if the anarch with this card is ready, you may look at the top card of each Methuselah's library (including your own).

rulings.text: Counts as requiring an Anarch (for eg. {Powerbase: Los Angeles}). [LSJ 20080603] [LSJ 20050128]

name: Sweeper

card_text:
Requires a ready titled Sabbat vampire.
Choose a Sabbat vampire. If this referendum is successful, put this card on the chosen vampire. This vampire is a Templar. He or she may enter combat with a ready vampire controlled by another Methuselah as a +1 stealth Ⓓ action. Any Sabbat vampire may call a referendum to burn this card as a +1 stealth political action.
flavor_text:
I don't have to kill anyone? Then why call for me?
Talley, The Hound, Lasombra

rulings.text: Each copy of this card provides its own action: if the vampire manage to unlock during the minion phase, he can perform the action more than once (once per copy). [RTR 20030519]
The two actions provided are not cross-restrictive. Each can be performed once during the same turn by the same minion. [LSJ 20100909]

The action provided by this card is considered to be an action requiring the listed clan/sect/capacity/title (e.g. the action provided by {Open War} is considered an action that requires an Anarch, the action provided by {The Gate of Acheron} is considered an action that requires Hecata). [LSJ 20080604]
rulings.group: Action requirements from a card in play

name: Templar

card_text:
Requires a Laibon.
Choose a vampire controlled by your prey with capacity less than X. Successful referendum means that vampire is burned. This acting vampire cannot gain blood this action. Any blood he or she gains goes to the blood bank instead.

rulings.text: If you play {Voter Captivation} on the referendum, you can move up to 2 counters to your pool, and 0 to your vampire. [LSJ 20081002]

name: The Eldest Command Undeath

card_text: Successful referendum means each vampire burns 1 blood. If this referendum fails, the acting vampire burns 1 blood.
flavor_text:
The final nights are at hand.
Thetmes, Assamite
name: The Final Nights

card_text: Choose another Methuselah. Successful referendum means this card is put in play. You get -1 hand size. The chosen Methuselah does not replace cards during any Methuselah's minion phase. Vampires can call a referendum to burn this card as a +1 stealth political action.

rulings.text: Stays in play and still reduces your handsize when the target is ousted. [LSJ 20021008]
Is removed from play and its effect cancelled if the Methuselah who played it is ousted. [LSJ 20021008]
The "do not replace" effect stacks with whatever "do not replace" clause the card itself has, so that the longest one wins out. [LSJ 20070320-1]
Cards that are not replaced count against the hand size (eg. successive combats against {Raptor} stack the non-replaced cards). [ANK 20180318] [ANK 20231229]

name: The Meddling of Semsith

card_text: Choose a vampire in torpor. Successful referendum means that vampire is moved to the uncontrolled region (facedown). The vampire's blood counters, master cards and minion cards stay with that vampire, with any counters they have on them (they are out of play as long as the vampire remains uncontrolled).
name: The Peace of Khetamon

card_text:
Requires a Laibon.
Choose an ally or retainer. If the acting Laibon is a magaji, choose up to two allies or retainers instead. Successful referendum means the chosen allies and retainers are burned, and their controllers burn 1 pool (each Methuselah burns no more than 1 pool, regardless of the number of allies and retainers chosen).
name: The Secret Must Be Kept

card_text:
Requires a ready Sabbat vampire with a capacity above 6.
Successful referendum means you steal 1 pool from each Methuselah who does not control a vampire with a capacity above 6.
name: Tithings

fr.name: Justicar Toréador
fr.card_text:
Titre.
Choisissez un Toréador disponible. Si le référendum passe, cette carte est mise sur le Toréador choisi pour représenter le titre unique de la Camarilla de Justicar Toréador. Durant ce référendum, chaque Toréador disponible reçoit +1 voix.

es.name: Justicar Toreador
es.card_text:
Título.
Elige a un Toreador preparado. Si el referéndum prospera, esta carta se pone en el Toreador elegido para representar el título Camarilla único de Justicar Toreador. En este referéndum, cada Toreador preparado obtiene +1 voto.

card_text:
Title.
Choose a ready Toreador. Successful referendum means this card is put on the chosen Toreador to represent the unique Camarilla title of Toreador Justicar. In this referendum, each ready Toreador gets +1 vote.

rulings.text: Only a Camarilla vampire can be chosen, it cannot be played without a valid target. [LSJ 20041026]

name: Toreador Justicar

card_text:
Requires a prince, justicar, or Inner Circle member.
Choose a ready Caitiff. If this referendum is successful, burn that Caitiff.
flavor_text:
The tradition finally becomes holy and inspires awe.
Friedrich Nietzsche, "Human, All Too Human"
name: Tradition Upheld

card_text: Successful referendum means you steal 1 pool from each Methuselah who has more pool than you do.
name: Transfer of Power

card_text: If this referendum is successful, each Methuselah burns X+1 pool, where X is the number of Assamites he or she controls.
name: Treaty of Tyre Enforced

card_text:
Title.
Choose a ready Tremere. If this referendum is successful, put this card on the chosen Tremere to represent the unique Camarilla title of Tremere Justicar. In this referendum, each Tremere gets 1 extra vote.

rulings.text: Only a Camarilla vampire can be chosen, it cannot be played without a valid target. [LSJ 20041026]

name: Tremere Justicar

card_text:
Requires a Sabbat vampire.
Choose a vampire who cast any votes in the most recent referendum (must be since your last turn). Successful referendum means that vampire takes X damage, where X is the number of votes he or she cast in that previous referendum.

rulings.text: "Since your last turn" means between the end of your last turn and now. Your last turn does not qualify, your current turn does. [LSJ 20020429]

name: Tribunal Judgment

card_text:
Requires a titled non-Red List vampire.
Choose a ready non-Red List minion. If this referendum succeeds, put this card on that minion. This minion is now Red List. In this referendum, the chosen minion's controller gets 2 additional votes for every Red List minion in play. Any titled vampire may call a referendum to burn this card as a +1 stealth political action. Burn this card if the minion is no longer Red List.

rulings.text: The action provided by this card is considered to be an action requiring the listed clan/sect/capacity/title (e.g. the action provided by {Open War} is considered an action that requires an Anarch, the action provided by {The Gate of Acheron} is considered an action that requires Hecata). [LSJ 20080604]
rulings.group: Action requirements from a card in play

name: Trumped-Up Charges

card_text:
Blood hunt referendum.
Choose an ally or younger non-titled vampire controlled by your prey. Successful referendum means that minion is burned. If this referendum fails or is canceled, no more Veles' Hunts can be played this game.

rulings.text: Modifiers and reactions can be played during and after the referendum (eg. {Voter Captivation}, {Delaying Tactics}). [LSJ 20081202-2]

name: Veles' Hunt

card_text:
Title.
Choose a ready Ventrue. If this referendum is successful, put this card on the chosen Ventrue to represent the unique Camarilla title of Ventrue Justicar. In this referendum, each Ventrue gets 1 extra vote.

rulings.text: Only a Camarilla vampire can be chosen, it cannot be played without a valid target. [LSJ 20041026]

name: Ventrue Justicar

card_text:
Unique. Requires a titled Sabbat vampire.
Successful referendum means this card is put in play. During your prey's unlock phase, they burn 1 pool. After your prey is ousted, burn this card and gain 3 additional pool. Vampires can call a referendum to burn this card as a +1 stealth political action that costs 1 pool.

Sabbat V5.precon: Path of Power and the Inner Voice

name: War of Ages

card_text: Choose a younger ready vampire. If this referendum succeeds, put this card on that vampire. Any ready vampire may enter combat with this vampire as a Ⓓ action that costs 1 blood.
name: Warrant

card_text:
Requires a Seraph. Watchtower.
In this referendum, each ready Seraph gets 2 additional votes. If this referendum is successful, put this card in play. Lock this card to move 1 blood from the blood bank to a Sabbat vampire in your ready region or your uncontrolled region (not usable during combat). Burn this card if another watchtower enters play.
name: Watchtower: Greatest Fall

card_text:
Requires an Inner Circle member.
Choose a ready justicar. If the referendum is successful, put this card on that justicar. The justicar loses his or her title, and his or her capacity decreases by 1. (A vampire's capacity cannot go below 1.)
name: Wrath of the Inner Circle

card_text: Choose one or more Methuselahs who are not chosen for any other Year of Fortune in play. If this referendum is successful, put this card into play. Each chosen Methuselah gets +1 hand size. Any vampire can call a referendum to burn this card as a +1 stealth political action.

rulings.text: The bonus disappears if the card is burned (either burned by a referendum or if the controller is ousted). [PIB 20121028]

name: Year of Fortune
